Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing expert Jim Crowley teaches us how to design and build our own rigs for every freshwater species.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin takes viewers to the top destinations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Stoked on Fishing crew takes you to the most amazing locations for some epic saltwater action.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim Crowley interviews top anglers and industry insiders from around the world of angling.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join the FishON! TV crew as we tackle rugged Northern Ontario terrain with our Polaris Ranger equipped with a custom boat rack. This remote expedition takes us deep into the wilderness to an untouched lake known for its walleye bounty. From the adrenaline of the journey to the thrill of the catch, this episode is packed with adventure, stunning scenery, and fishing tips you won’t want to miss!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Trailblazing to Trophy Walleye: Polaris Ranger Adventure
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim and Capt Chris Adams, sight fish for Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon on the east coast of Florida.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we head to Frederick House Lake in Connaught, Ontario, just east of Timmins. With a narrow window of opportunity before the weather closes in, we reel in some fantastic walleye, sauger, and other exciting species. It's all about adapting to the elements and making the most of the moment!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Storm’s Edge Success: Fishing Frederick House Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: As fall grips Northern Ontario, unpredictable weather makes fishing a true test of patience and perseverance. Paul is joined by young angler Matthew, who’s finishing university and weighing the decision to stay in the North. Facing extreme cold on their first attempt, the duo regroup and return a few days later to a new lake, chasing walleye and capturing the stunning wilderness that makes Northern Ontario a fall angler’s paradise.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Fall Walleye Challenge

Video.summary: Shea McIntee and the crew spend day two of their two and a half-day fishing trip on the El Dorado sportfishing boat out of Long Beach Sportfishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Bluefin Tuna and Yellowtail Fishing on the El Dorado, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Kim targets groups of smallmouth bass along the Lake St. Clair Flats with a Strike King "Shadalicious" swimbait. Then dives in to reveal what these fish are positioned around.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook n' Look — Shadalicious and Feeding Fishes
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Remote Northern Wilderness, Smallmouth Bass Fishing part 3
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A friendly Father and Son challenge, chasing big walleye in Longlac, Ontario, Canada
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week we find everyones favorite fish...sheephead. but were going out in search of Giants!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Operation Fishing Freedom heads south to the Gulf Of Mexico with Vietnam Army Medic John Hitchens in search of a shark. He shares his story of being a medic during the Vietnam War to becoming part of a sober bike club.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Vietnam Medic John Hitchens
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This is our six-year fishing with acute angling aboard the Blackwater Explorer fishing the Rio Negro in the Amazon River of Brazil. Shea McIntee and the crew fish for Peacock Bass and hope to get lucky and catch a monster.
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing — Home of the Largest Peacock Bass

Image.alt: Stoked on Fishing — Home of the Largest Peacock Bass
Stoked on Fishing — Home of the Largest Peacock Bass
Stoked on Fishing — Home of the Largest Peacock Bass

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Grandpa's Back Yard
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Grandpa's Back Yard
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman’s Pro vs Joe Coach Em' Up2
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Coach Em' Up2
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Going camping and trout fishing in the Sierras is one of our favorite things to do. For the first time, Shea McIntee and the crew head down to South Lake Bishop. What makes this trip unique is that we get to fish with some good friends.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - An Unforgettable Trip, South Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and St. Croix Rods' Dan Johnston utilize the latest in fishing technology to tap mid-summer Midwestern bass.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Up the Creek
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Up the Creek
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: At Alpena, Michigan, Shaw battles largemouth and smallmouth bass, plus "toothy critters."
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — Michigan Mixed Bag
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Larry gives us the inside scoop on tactics and techniques for catching walleye in big water.
Video.title: Slow Death Walleyes

Video.summary: Dustin fishes brackish water for bass amd stipers
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you, in detail how to build your own Ned Rig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building A Ned Rig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1
